caribbean.headline: Caribbean Storms Bring Heavy Rain
caribbean.paragraph: Roatan is experiencing 88% rain probability with winds of 18 kt and wave heights of 3.5 ft, while Martinique has a less intense system with winds of 14 kt. I expect the Western Caribbean to be most impacted, particularly around Roatan, due to the high rain probability and moderate winds.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Sees Calm Seas
mediterranean.paragraph: Athens is experiencing a 62% rain probability with winds at 9 kt and wave heights of 0.7 ft, while Mykonos has a less than 10% rain probability with winds reaching 18 kt. The Eastern Mediterranean region remains generally calm, with no significant weather warnings issued for the area, including ports such as Athens and Mykonos.
